message.content:
@startuml
actor teacher
participant "操作界面" as UI #DDE6F4#032B57 
database studentcourse  #DDE6F4#032B57  
entity student   #DDE6F4#032B57   
control experiment    #DDE6F4#032B57    
boundary experimentscore     #DDE6F4#032B57     
collections scoreitem      #DDE6F4#032B57      

teacher ->UI :1选择学期
==
activate UI 
|||
UI->studentcourse:2查询哪些学生选了老师的课
 activate studentcourse |||

studentcourse->student:3请求学生列表
 activate student |||

student-->studentcourse:4返回数据
 deactivate student |||

deactivate studentcourse |||

UI->experiment:5查询这些课程的实验
 activate experiment |||

experiment->experimentscore:6查询实验得分
 activate experimentscore |||

experimentscore->scoreitem:7查询得分
 activate scoreitem |||

scoreitem -->experimentscore:8返回
 deactivate scoreitem |||

experimentscore -->experiment:9返回得分
 deactivate experimentscore |||

experiment -->UI:10返回得分列表
 deactivate experiment |||

UI -->teacher:11显示数据
 deactivate UI 

@enduml
